mapper.select: SELECT h.homework_id AS homeworkId, c.name AS campName, cp.title AS planTitle, h.content AS content, h.submit_time AS submitTime, h.is_small_group_excellent AS isSmallGroupExcellent, h.is_big_group_excellent AS isBigGroupExcellent FROM t_homework h LEFT JOIN t_camp_plan cp ON h.plan_id = cp.plan_id LEFT JOIN t_camp c ON cp.camp_id = c.camp_id WHERE h.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY h.submit_time DESC
